name: Coda

composio_registry_match.name: Coda
composio_registry_match.description: Collaborative workspace platform that transforms documents into powerful tools for team productivity and project management

description: A cloud-based document platform that combines documents, spreadsheets, and apps into a unified workspace.
notes: While the documentation header refers to 'Superhuman Docs', this is the official Coda API documentation portal. The platform supports API keys for authentication.
